This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Advanced Midwifery and Home Birth: One board for every family from the free consultation and New Client Inquiry Form through the 37-week on-call window, home birth, and the day-1, day-3, 1-2 week, and 3-4 week postpartum visits.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Book a Free Consultation, Monthly visits until 32 weeks, On-call availability for births after 37 weeks, Text Jessica Today to Start Care

Today ops snapshot Prenatal + birth + postpartum board Family record Consult + inquiry form view Prenatal cadence + on-call window Postpartum + newborn care view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every family's prenatal cadence tracked in one place — monthly to 32 weeks, biweekly to 36, weekly to birth.
  • 36-37 week home visit and 37-week on-call window surface automatically by gestational age.
  • Postpartum ladder (day 1 / day 3 / 1-2 wk / 3-4 wk) and 36-week payment deadline tracked on the same record as labs and the superbill.
